name: Memory Garden
description: A cultivated memory system — typed, importance-weighted, and designed for LLM gardening

embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the LanceDB database directory

autoCapture.enabled.label: Auto-Capture Conversations
autoCapture.enabled.help: Automatically capture conversations as chat_log entries for later extraction

autoCapture.maxChars.label: Max Capture Size
autoCapture.maxChars.help: Maximum characters per conversation to capture

autoCapture.retentionDays.label: Retention Days
autoCapture.retentionDays.help: Days to keep raw chat_log entries before cleanup
